topic: F3 prod KSG MI scipy raw#9 exemption design — formal proposal + exemption boundary
raw_100_fallback_disclosure: kick infra sub-agent unwired (22nd iter). In-context fallback per raw 100.
carry_forward_origin: F3 cycle 1 production scale (n=200 perms=100) terminated 15m34s 25.8GB RSS Mac jetsam — hexa interp single-thread bottleneck. Closure doc `docs/anima_evolution_omega_saturation_3cycle_closure_20260428.md` lists F3 prod strict scipy path as 'raw#9 exemption candidate'. anima/.own own 1 already has 2 .py opt-outs (active_redteam_dEF_proto.py + active_redteam_prototype.py) for gitignored Python research harness — precedent exists for explicit relaxation.
scope_boundary: DESIGN ONLY — raw#9 exemption proposal text + exemption boundary definition; not modify .own this cycle.

intake.topic_summary: F3 KSG MI strict p<0.05 needs O(n²) bootstrap permutation test (n=200 + perms=100 = 20K ops) which hexa interp single-thread cannot complete within 15m Mac jetsam memory window. scipy.stats.permutation_test (vectorized numpy + multiprocessing) completes same task in seconds. Question: what does raw#9 exemption boundary look like that admits scipy for measurement-statistics-only contexts while preserving hexa-only mandate for SSOT/governance/orchestration?

falsifiers_preregistered.name: exemption-precedent-already-exists
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: anima/.own own 1 already lists 2 .py opt-outs (active_redteam_*) — proposal IS extension of established pattern, not new policy

falsifiers_preregistered.name: exemption-scope-narrow-not-broad
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: exemption MUST be narrow: only measurement statistics path (KSG MI / scipy permutation_test), NOT broad relaxation. SSOT/governance/orchestration/canonical-helpers stay hexa-only
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: scope diff between exempt and non-exempt categories

falsifiers_preregistered.name: exempted-files-gitignored-OR-explicit-relaxation-comment
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: exempted .py files MUST be gitignored OR carry header comment '@raw9-relaxation: <rationale>' for grep-able audit trail (mirrors active_redteam_*.py pattern)

falsifiers_preregistered.name: exemption-falsifier-clear
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: if exempted .py file proliferates beyond original scope OR is invoked by SSOT/governance path → raw#9 violation re-opens. Clear retirement criterion per raw 71

falsifiers_preregistered.name: alternative-impl-exhausted-evidence
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: before exemption granted, hexa-native alternatives MUST be exhausted: (a) hetzner offload Mac→hetzner reduces memory pressure; (b) batch-size reduction n=100 perms=50 fits within 15m; (c) hexa-side scipy-equivalent KSG impl. Each must be documented attempted-and-rejected per raw 91 honesty

axis_c.name: raw 71 retirement criterion for exemption
axis_c.criterion: Exemption is RETIRED (re-opens raw#9 violation) if any of: (a) exempted .py file is invoked by SSOT/governance/orchestration path (grep audit), (b) exempted .py file count grows beyond agreed-upon set without further design proposal, (c) hexa-native scipy-equivalent KSG impl lands and matches scipy outputs (then exempted .py archive/retire), (d) raw 9 hexa-only mandate strengthen at hive-lang level forbids all .py exceptions

fan_out.correlation_estimate: axes a/b/c — proposal text vs exhaustion vs retirement. corr ~0.20 each.
